name: @celiums/federation
description: Celiums Knowledge Federation Layer — federates real-time curated knowledge across 10 verified public APIs (PubMed, OpenAlex, CrossRef, arXiv, SemanticScholar, EuropePMC, ClinicalTrials, OpenFDA, Wikipedia, Wikidata). Replaces the retired universal_knowledge raw-dump tool; becomes research_search v2. Separate deployable service — does NOT touch the celiums-memory MCP image (decision #1).
